body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #1182

Adds a struct `ClimaLandSimulation` for the full, integrated land model. This PR also extends the necessary Interfacer functions for a simulation type (`get_field`, `update_field!`, `step!`, etc).

This PR requires https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/pull/1035 from ClimaLand, so it uses that branch in the `experiments/ClimaEarth/` environment. That PR will need to be merged and a release of ClimaLand made before we can merge this PR. - This is done as of 3/13/25

### Content
- [x] add `get_field` functions
- [x] add `update_field!` functions
- [x] add method for `add_coupler_fields!`, following https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1207
  - coupler exchange fields when running with the full land model will include the defaults 
    - `[:z0m_sfc, :z0b_sfc, :beta, :emissivity, :F_turb_energy, :F_turb_moisture, :F_turb_ρτxz, :F_turb_ρτyz, :temp1, :temp2]` 
  - and land model-specific quantities 
    - `[:SW_d, :LW_d, :cos_zenith_angle, :diffuse_fraction, :c_co2, :d_sfc, :P_air, :T_air, :q_air]`
- [x] add test to check that constructor is initialized correctly and can be stepped

### Next steps
This PR adds a lot of the software infrastructure to set up and run a `LandModel` in a coupled simulation, but doesn't actually run a coupled simulation with it. Next, we'll update partitioned turbulent fluxes to support the integrated land model, and then we can try using it in a coupled simulation.
title: add ClimaLandSimulation struct
